AssetsPage.title: Invest in digital revenue rights of energy projects
AssetsPage.description: Buy fractional positions in energy projects, receive payouts in KZTE or ENERGY_POINTS, and review verifiable proof-of-asset data.
AssetsPage.heroMetric1Description: A public marketplace of tokenized energy projects.
AssetsPage.heroMetric2Description: Choose monetary payouts or energy points.
AssetsPage.noAssetsFound: No assets matched the selected filters.
AssetsPage.sidebarDescription: You invest not in a piece of equipment, but in a share of future revenue from an energy project with verifiable on-chain and off-chain proofs.

PortfolioPage.title: Your positions in energy assets
PortfolioPage.description: Track purchased shares, payout bucket split and open the secondary market flow directly from your portfolio.
PortfolioPage.heroMetric1Description: Number of unique assets where you hold positions.
PortfolioPage.heroMetric2Description: Total number of shares across all your positions.
PortfolioPage.positionDescription: One card combines all your bucket positions for a single asset ID.
PortfolioPage.sellDialogDescription: Choose a bucket, share amount and price per share.
PortfolioPage.confirmSellDescription: Confirm OTC listing creation for {shareAmount} shares from {payoutMode} bucket.

errors.noSharesInSelectedBucket: No available shares in the selected bucket.
errors.exceedsAvailable: You cannot list more shares than available in the selected bucket.
errors.invalidPrice: Enter a valid price per share.

AssetDetailPage.noDescription: Description has not been added yet.
AssetDetailPage.restrictedWarning: Private documents and buying are available only after DeKYC login.
AssetDetailPage.distributionText: {investor}% of revenue goes to investors, {operator}% goes to the operator or reserve.
AssetDetailPage.noDocuments: No documents have been uploaded for this asset yet.
AssetDetailPage.privateDocsHidden: Documents are available only after authorization and active access through DeKYC.
AssetDetailPage.judgeDescription: This page exposes hashes, document links and on-chain addresses to verify the connection between the real asset and the token.
AssetDetailPage.guestPreviewWarning: You are viewing a public preview. Log in through DeKYC to buy shares and access private documents.
AssetDetailPage.restrictedPreviewWarning: You are logged in, but full access to private docs and buying is currently restricted.
AssetDetailPage.privateDocsHiddenGuest: Private documents are hidden. Log in through DeKYC to unlock full access.
AssetDetailPage.privateDocsHiddenRestricted: Private documents are hidden. Your account is authenticated, but full access has not been activated yet.

JudgePage.title: Project verification for judges
JudgePage.description: This page aggregates the full end-to-end project flow: Solana, KZTE, assets, positions, epochs, claims and verifiable metadata hashes.
JudgePage.createEpochDescription: The judge can manually create a revenue epoch for a selected asset and immediately verify the claim flow.

OtcPage.title: Secondary share market
OtcPage.description: Users can place shares on the OTC board and buy them inside the platform.
OtcPage.empty: There are no open OTC listings yet.
OtcPage.heroMetric1Description: Available OTC offers on the secondary market.
OtcPage.heroMetric2Description: Trades are settled inside ENERGY with KZTE settlement and escrow shares.
OtcPage.noListingsFound: No listings matched the selected filters.
OtcPage.openOwnListingHint: Created by your account. Self-purchase is not allowed.
OtcPage.openListingHint: Open the card to view details and buy the listing.
OtcPage.sidebarDescription: The OTC marketplace shows that an investor can not only buy a position, but also exit it through a built-in market mechanism.
OtcPage.listingDescription: Review listing parameters and confirm the purchase.
OtcPage.confirmBuyDescription: Confirm the purchase of a listing with {shares} shares and payout mode {payoutMode}.

HistoryPage.title: History of actions for your energy assets
HistoryPage.description: Track purchases, OTC trades and claim payouts in a single history feed with tx links and clear grouping by event type.
HistoryPage.heroMetric1Description: Complete history of actions across assets, claims and OTC listings.
HistoryPage.heroMetric2Description: Number of recorded claim payouts in your history.
HistoryPage.emptyTab: No events found for this tab.
HistoryPage.emptyOtcTab: No events found for this OTC section.

SettingsPage.title: Action confirmation password
SettingsPage.description: This password is used to confirm sensitive actions: buying shares, claiming payouts and OTC operations.

BuySharesDialog.title: Buy shares
BuySharesDialog.description: Choose share quantity, payout mode and confirm the action with your password.
BuySharesDialog.confirmDescription: Confirm purchase of {quantity} shares with payout mode {payoutMode}.

SellSharesDialog.title: Sell shares via OTC
SellSharesDialog.description: Enter share amount and price per share, then confirm the action with your password.
SellSharesDialog.confirmDescription: Confirm OTC listing creation for {shareAmount} shares from {payoutMode} bucket.

errors.exceedsAvailable: You cannot list more shares than available.
errors.invalidPrice: Enter a valid price per share.

ProfilePage.title: User profile
ProfilePage.description: DeKYC identity, custodial wallet, token balances and security status in one place.
